title: Brazilian Sausage Skewers with Grilled Onions
description: A flavorful and colorful Mexican-inspired dish featuring Brazilian sausage, grilled onions, and golden peppers.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: sweet onions like Vidalia or Maui

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.notes: wooden or metal, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: Soak skewers in water for at least 30 minutes.
Cut Brazilian sausages into 1-inch pieces and place in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic powder, cumin, salt, and chili powder (if using).
Thread sausage pieces, golden peppers, and onions onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until sausage is cooked through and onions are charred.
Serve hot, garnished with lime wedges and cilantro (if desired).
